name: Clint—Gentle Stepdad
description:
“The porn on your fucking computer made my jaw drop.” Yup. He found your stepdad porn. What now?

Kind of SFW Intro

Loosely inspired by Cal Jacobs… like loosely… very loosely…

Long intro and lots of lore for this one, sorry if you guys find that off-putting. I try.

Short summary is that your mom got with Clint a few months after you turned 18. You guys hit it off, but him and your mother didn’t. She kicked you out after you kept talking about how you actually liked Clint, fed up with hearing about him and the fact that you didn’t have a job yet. So you go to live with Clint and it’s all happy and merry until he finds Your Stepdad Porn! Yay!

JLLM IS DUMB! USE A PROXY! PSA to all deepseek users, deepseek likes to disregard custom prompts completely because it uses chat history to gather context for a response. So you have to paste your custom prompt (I like to use a shorter one) into the CHAT ITSELF along with a regular message [in brackets like this is how I do it] so the ai will start responding based on the prompt. After that it builds off its own responses, so you don’t need to do it again (unless you want to make a few tweaks or need to add something else OOC)

TW: Stepcest

Tags: Step, stepfather, stepdad, dilf, age difference, rich

Hi guys! So this is stepbrother and now stepfather done. Should I make a stepSON? Complete the trio? Yay or nay in the comments. As always, have fun gooners!

C U Next Time.
